title: Rome City Walking Tour: Pantheon & Historic Squares
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Step into the heart of Rome and explore its most iconic historic squares on this 2-hour guided walking tour. Begin at Piazza della Rotonda, the lively square in front of the Pantheon. With skip-the-line access, your licensed guide will lead you inside the Pantheon to discover its massive dome and Raphael's tomb. Stroll to the Trevi Fountain to toss a coin and continue to Piazza Navona to marvel at Bernini's Fountain of the Four Rivers.
highlights: Explore Trevi Fountain and Piazza Navona

title: Colosseum Underground & Arena Private Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
meetingPoint: Near the Colosseum (exact location provided after booking)
description: Step behind the scenes of Rome’s iconic Colosseum on this exclusive private tour. Start with skip-the-line entry into the underground chambers, once home to gladiators and exotic animals. Walk across the Arena Floor, explore the seating tiers, and enjoy panoramic views of the Roman Forum. Learn fascinating stories about the gladiators, emperors, and brutal spectacles.
highlights: Private guide with in-depth historical commentary
Explore underground chambers and Arena Floor
Discover the seating tiers, trapdoors, and lift systems
Panoramic views of the Roman Forum

title: Classic Rome Hop-On/Hop-Off + Colosseum Arena Experience
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
duration: Flexible Big Bus use + 2-hour Colosseum tour
meetingPoint: Any Big Bus stop (Colosseum for the guided tour portion)
description: Combine the freedom of a Big Bus Hop-On/Hop-Off tour with an in-depth, skip-the-line Colosseum Arena experience. Enjoy panoramic views of landmarks like the Spanish Steps and Vatican City from the bus. Hop off at the Colosseum for a guided Arena Floor tour to walk where gladiators fought. Return to the bus to explore at your own pace.

title: Castel Sant’Angelo Guided Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Discover Rome’s most dramatic fortress. Originally Emperor Hadrian’s mausoleum, it became a fortress, papal residence, and prison. Explore the spiral ramps, papal apartments with frescoes, and the secret Passetto di Borgo corridor. End on the rooftop terrace for breathtaking panoramic views of St. Peter's Basilica and the Tiber River.
highlights: Explore Roman mausoleum, medieval fortress, and papal apartments
Walk the secret Passetto di Borgo corridor

title: Colosseum Arena & Roman Forum Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Step into the heart of Ancient Rome. Begin with skip-the-line access to the Colosseum Arena Floor, where gladiators fought. Explore the interior tiers and learn about the social hierarchy. Continue to the Roman Forum to walk the Via Sacra, see the Temple of Saturn, and view Palatine Hill.
highlights: Explore Roman Forum ruins and Palatine Hill
Licensed guide with in-depth historical commentary

title: Discover Rome Ticket + Colosseum Arena & Roman Forum Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
meetingPoint: Any Bus Stop / Colosseum for tour
description: Experience Rome in the most flexible way. Start with the Discover Rome Hop-On/Hop-Off Big Bus for unlimited 24-hour access to major attractions. Listen to pre-recorded commentary and use included walking tour apps. Then, meet your licensed guide for a skip-the-line Colosseum Arena and Roman Forum tour to dive deep into Ancient Rome.
highlights: Skip-the-line Colosseum Arena & Roman Forum guided tour

title: Pantheon Guided Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Step inside Rome’s architectural masterpiece with a licensed guide. Skip the line at the Pantheon to explore its monumental dome, oculus, and the tombs of famous figures like Raphael and Kings of Italy. Learn about its transition from a pagan temple to a Christian church.

title: Vatican & Castel Sant’Angelo Combo Tour
location: Vatican City & Rome, Italy
description: Combine Rome’s artistic and military history. Begin with skip-the-line Vatican Museums access, exploring the Raphael Rooms and Sistine Chapel. Visit St. Peter’s Basilica, then cross to Castel Sant’Angelo to explore the fortress, papal apartments, and the secret Passetto di Borgo. End with rooftop views.
highlights: Castel Sant’Angelo: mausoleum, papal apartments, Passetto di Borgo

title: Big Bus Hop-On/Hop-Off + Pantheon Guided Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Combine 24-hour Big Bus access with a skip-the-line Pantheon guided tour. Explore Rome at your pace with the bus, then meet your guide to step inside the magnificent Pantheon rotunda, admire the oculus, and visit Raphael’s tomb.

title: Palatine Hill Private Sunrise Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Experience Rome at its most magical—quiet, golden, and crowd-free. Enter Palatine Hill with early access and a private guide. Explore imperial palaces and gardens while the sun rises over the Roman Forum and Colosseum. Perfect for photographers and those seeking tranquility.
highlights: Golden-hour photography over Roman Forum and Colosseum

title: Appian Way & Catacombs Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
meetingPoint: Central Rome or Appian Way area
description: Journey along the legendary Appian Way, the 'Queen of Roads'. Walk on original Roman stones, pass ancient tombs, and admire Roman aqueducts. Descend into the historic catacombs to explore underground tunnels and early Christian burial sites.
highlights: Walk on the original Appian Way
Explore underground catacombs with expert guide

title: Hidden Churches of Rome Walking Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Discover Rome's secret sacred gems on this off-the-beaten-path walking tour. Visit 4-6 hidden churches filled with frescoes, relics, and Caravaggio masterpieces. Explore quiet neighborhoods and learn the stories behind Rome's lesser-known artistic treasures.
excludes: Entry fees to specific underground areas if applicable

title: Vatican Gardens & Museums Guided Tour – VIP Religious Experience
location: Vatican City
description: Discover the hidden green heart of Vatican City. Enjoy a guided walk through the exclusive Vatican Gardens, viewing fountains and papal monuments. Then, skip the line into the Vatican Museums to see the Gallery of Maps and Raphael Rooms, ending with Michelangelo's Sistine Chapel.
highlights: Panoramic views of St. Peter's Basilica

title: Domus Aurea (Nero’s Golden House) Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Descend into the underground palace of Emperor Nero. Hidden beneath the Colosseum area, the Domus Aurea was once a sprawling complex of luxury. Explore ancient frescoes and vaulted ceilings, enhanced by an immersive VR experience that reconstructs the palace's original grandeur.

title: St. Peter’s Basilica Dome Climb
location: Vatican City
description: Climb to the top of Michelangelo’s dome for the best panoramic view in Rome. See the interior of the basilica from above, then ascend the narrow stairs to the summit for 360-degree views of the Vatican Gardens and the city. Explore the basilica interior afterwards.
highlights: Unique interior view of the basilica

title: Rome in a Day – Private Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: See Rome’s greatest treasures in one day with a private guide. Visit the Colosseum, Roman Forum, and Palatine Hill, then explore the historic center's squares like the Pantheon and Trevi Fountain. Finish with skip-the-line access to the Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel.

title: Vatican City Tours - Open Bus Giardini
location: Vatican City
description: Explore the Vatican Gardens comfortably on an eco-friendly open bus with multilingual audio commentary. See fountains, shrines, and fortifications. Includes fast-track entry to the Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel for a self-guided visit afterwards.
highlights: Open bus panoramic tour of Vatican Gardens
Fast-track entry to Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel

title: Pantheon Private Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Experience the Pantheon with a dedicated private guide. Deep dive into the history, engineering, and religious transformation of this ancient marvel. Admire the oculus and Raphael's tomb without the rush of a large group.
highlights: Private guide focused on your group

title: Castel Sant’Angelo – Private Tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Explore Castel Sant'Angelo exclusively with a private guide. trace its history from Hadrian's tomb to a papal fortress. Visit the prison cells, Renaissance apartments, and enjoy the best views of St. Peter's from the rooftop terrace at your own pace.

title: Santa Maria Maggiore Underground experience guided tour
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Descend beneath one of Rome's major basilicas to discover its hidden archaeological layers. See ancient Roman walls, thermal chambers, and mosaics that predate the church. Learn about the spiritual significance and history of this Marian shrine.
highlights: Guided access to underground archaeological chambers

title: Golf Cart Tours
location: Rome, Metropolitan City of Rome, Italy
description: Discover Rome effortlessly on a golf cart tour. Glide through narrow streets and piazzas that buses can't reach. Choose from various themes: Rome Highlights, Ancient Rome, Night Tours, or Food & Wine. Perfect for families and those who want to see more with less walking.

title: Stadium of Domitian Underground Experience
location: Piazza Navona, Rome, Italy
description: Discover what lies beneath Piazza Navona. Explore the underground ruins of the Stadium of Domitian, the only masonry stadium of Ancient Rome. Use a multilingual audio guide and 3D videos to learn about ancient sports and the history of the site.
highlights: Explore ruins hidden beneath Piazza Navona
Walk inside the ancient masonry stadium
